# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

apiVersion: kong.kubernetes.io/v1
kind: KongPluginConfigs
metadata:
  name: my-plugin-configs
spec:
  plugins:
    cors:
      enabled: true
      global:
        allow_origin: ['https://app1.example.com', 'https://app2.example.com']
        allow_headers: ['Content-Type', 'Authorization', 'X-Api-Key']
        expose_header: ['X-Kong-Consumer-Real-Ip']
        max_age: 3600
      service:
        - name: my-service-1
          allow_origin: ['https://web-app1.example.com']
        - name: my-service-2
          allow_origin: ['https://web-app2.example.com']
      route:
        - service: my-service-1
          routes:
            - id: route-1
              allow_method: ['GET', 'POST', 'PUT', 'DELETE']
        - service: my-service-2
          routes:
            - id: route-2
              allow_method: ['GET', 'POST', 'PUT', 'DELETE']
    key-auth:
      enabled: true
      service:
        - name: my-service-1
          username: apikey-user1
          apikey: apikey-1
        - name: my-service-2
          username: apikey-user2
          apikey: apikey-2
    limit-req:
      enabled: true
      global:
        limit_rpm: 500
      service:
        - name: my-service-1
          limit_rpm: 300
        - name: my-service-2
          limit_rpm: 400
      route:
        - service: my-service-1
          routes:
            - id: route-1
              limit_req_zone: custom-my-service-1-zone
              burst: 5
              per_client: true
              limit_rpm: 200
        - service: my-service-2
          routes:
            - id: route-2
              limit_req_zone: custom-my-service-2-zone
              burst: 4
              per_client: true
              limit_rpm: 300
